Yaohong Zheng | Resume

Yaohong Zheng
AI Agent Infra / Agent Runtime / Backend Architecture / Engineering Lead

Updated 2026-03-25
GitHub / jnuyao — https://github.com/jnuyao

Focused on Agent Runtime / AI Infra, with deep engineering background in international payments, ad delivery, and growth systems.

Active OpenClaw contributor working on Agent Runtime: runtime bug fixes at the source-code level, end-to-end channel plugin analysis (WeChat / Lark), layered Memory design, observability mechanisms, and multi-agent collaboration patterns.

10+ years of backend and systems architecture experience across payout orchestration at ByteDance International Payments, high-concurrency ad delivery engines at Ant Group, private-domain marketing platforms and growth systems at Tencent Ads, and analytics infrastructure at Fibodata.

Target Roles: AI Agent Infra / Agent Runtime / Channel Integrations / Memory & Observability
Agent Practice: OpenClaw Contributor · End-to-end Channel Plugin Analysis · Memory / Observability / Multi-Agent Design
Engineering Background: ByteDance Intl. Payments · Tencent Ads · Ant Group · Freshippo · 10B PV/day · 100k+ QPS

---

Key Highlights

OpenClaw contributions and Agent Runtime practice
Contributed source-level fixes for real OpenClaw issues across Web UI, Usage, Gateway Logs, Feishu integrations, Markdown / rich-text parsing, and group session labeling. Mapped the full message path of WeChat and Lark plugins into the OpenClaw runtime. Authored system designs for layered Memory architecture, observability diagnostics, and multi-agent collaboration.
Verifiable on GitHub: github.com/jnuyao

Payout orchestration and reliability at scale
Owned payout dispatch and reliability for ByteDance International Payments, building a unified dispatch capability from 0 to 1 across SLA peaks, liquidity constraints, large-amount / hold cases, channel maintenance, and real-time unhold scenarios.
Average payout time 171 min → 105 min (-39%) · Hyperwallet -54% · 48.4% of daily flow covered

High-scale ads and growth infrastructure
Built and led ad delivery engines, private-domain marketing platforms, growth systems, and analytics infrastructure across 0-to-1 launches, scale expansion, and platform abstraction for complex business lines.
10B PV/day · 100k+ QPS · 50B+ records · 300k/day off-app traffic

---

Open-source and Independent Practice

Ongoing open-source contributions and independent project work. Activity available on GitHub.

OpenClaw Contributor
Runtime issue triage and source-level fixes
Contributed source-level fixes for real OpenClaw issues across the Web UI rendering, Usage statistics, Gateway Logs pipeline, Feishu extension adapters, Markdown / rich-text parsing, and group session labeling.

Channel Plugins / Runtime
End-to-end channel plugin and message-path analysis
Mapped the full message path of the openclaw-weixin and openclaw-lark plugins into the OpenClaw runtime: event ingestion (webhook / callback verification) → message parsing → authentication (token / OAuth) → routing and session management → agent invocation → response rendering.

Memory / Observability / Team Agent
Agent infrastructure and collaboration design
Authored system designs for Agent infrastructure: layered Memory architecture (short-term / long-term / Bridge Policy), answer-level observability diagnostics panel, full-context understanding and conversation context switching, multi-agent collaboration hierarchy, and Team Agent workflow orchestration.

---

Professional Experience

Feb 2024 - Present
ByteDance · International Payments
Technical Owner, Payout Dispatch
Owned payout dispatch and stability for ByteDance International Payments, taking the unified dispatch capability from 0 to 1 and iterating it in production.
- System build-out: Built a unified dispatch system from 0 to 1 across SLA peaks, liquidity constraints, large-amount / hold cases, channel maintenance, and real-time unhold scenarios.
- Control model: Established a reusable framework for prioritization, rate limiting, release / traffic smoothing, and paired it with gray rollout, rollback, observability, alerting, and operating procedures.
- Business impact: Reduced FY25 overall payout average duration from 171 minutes to 105 minutes (-39%), and cut Hyperwallet mid-month payout total duration by 403 minutes (-54%).
- Cross-functional delivery: Expanded normalized dispatch governance to 48.4% of daily flow (61% channel coverage), and improved CCDC Payin success rate by about 0.5% through SmartRetry validation.

Sep 2021 - Jan 2024
Tencent Ads · Conversion Hub
Engineering and Team Management, Private-domain Marketing Platform
Led engineering and delivery for a private-domain marketing platform supporting merchant conversion funnels across lead acquisition, intent capture, deposits, and order placement.
- Platform management: Owned team execution across OKRs, base architecture, staffing, release planning, and delivery cadence.
- Core architecture: Led storage and computing for billion-scale user-behavior data, online marketing services, and domain-driven architecture.
- Complex capabilities: Built and stabilized systems for sharding, user profiles, full-text search, and marketing automation.

Dec 2017 - Sep 2021
Ant Group / Freshippo
Ad Delivery, Marketing Platforms, and Growth Systems
Worked across Ant Group and Freshippo on DSP, marketing platform, and growth initiatives during periods of rapid business and system growth.

Ant Group · Bailing DSP for External Ad Buying
Built an RTB DSP from 0 to 1 during Alipay's rapid growth phase, leading the development of the business platform, delivery engine, and quality tooling. The system handled 10B PV per day and sustained over 100k QPS.

Freshippo · Marketing Platform
Built marketing capabilities for campaign planning, intelligent product selection, and off-app traffic growth, integrated Taobao ecosystem transaction data, and connected internal and external traffic channels to support 300k/day off-app traffic.
- Long-term leverage: Built durable experience in high-concurrency architecture, high availability, platform abstraction, and growth-system design during fast-scaling phases.

2015 - 2017
Fibodata Analytics Platform
Analytics Infrastructure
Built a pre-computation-based analytics engine while the team scaled from tens of thousands of PV to hundreds of millions of PV.
- Platform build: Worked on core data engineering and participated in platform architecture evolution.
- Scale: Collected 1B PV of traffic per day and supported analytics over more than 50B records.
- Long-term leverage: Established data-layer capabilities that were later reused across ads, growth, and marketing systems.

---

Education

Jinan University · Dual Bachelor's Degrees in Applied Physics and Finance
2009 - 2013
- Dual bachelor's degrees in Applied Physics and Finance.
- National Scholarship recipient.
- Awarded the provincial Challenge Cup Special Prize and a national first prize.
